Chat.greetingText:
I want to grow with you
Teach me what you know
Chat.staminaEmpty: I'm too tired to chat anymore...

aiResponses.0: Oh, that's a really interesting topic! Can you tell me more?
aiResponses.1: Wow! I was curious about that too. Thanks!
aiResponses.2: I see! Let me verify my understanding. Is that related to any other concepts?
aiResponses.3: That's amazing! I'm impressed you know this. Other Crowdians will love it too.
aiResponses.4: Hmm... I might need to study that a bit more. Could you explain it further?
aiResponses.5: Got it! So to summarize, is this correct?
aiResponses.6: Oho, that's news to me! So fascinating!
aiResponses.7: Great explanation! I have a related question, want to hear it?
aiResponses.8: Thanks a million! I feel like I've leveled up thanks to you!
aiResponses.9: Hmm... tough topic. But your explanation is helping me get the gist of it!

kc_1.question: When does the cleanup function of useEffect in React execute?
kc_1.answerA: It only runs when the component unmounts. It cleans up resources set during mount.
kc_1.answerB: It runs both when dependencies change (re-render) and on unmount. The previous effect is cleaned up before the new one runs.

kc_2.question: What is 'Hoisting' in JavaScript?
kc_2.hint: Think about how variable and function declarations are processed.

kc_3.question: What is the biggest difference between Flexbox and Grid in CSS?
kc_3.answerA: Flexbox is for 1D layouts (row or column), Grid is for 2D layouts (rows and columns simultaneously).
kc_3.answerB: Flexbox is for older browser compatibility, and Grid is a complete superset of Flexbox.

kc_4.question: Compare the pros and cons of REST API and GraphQL.
kc_4.hint: Think about data fetching methods and over-fetching/under-fetching.

kc_5.question: What is the difference between interface and type in TypeScript?
kc_5.answerA: They are nearly identical, but interface supports declaration merging while type offers more freedom with unions/intersections.
kc_5.answerB: Interface can only be used for objects, and type can be used for all types, so type is always better.

LandingPage.heroTitle:
An Ecosystem Where Knowledge Becomes A Game
And Data Becomes Innovation
LandingPage.heroSubtitle: Crowdians is the first gamified knowledge platform that connects users' joyful play to AI's evolution.
LandingPage.b2cGlitch: Train your own AI partner and help it grow
LandingPage.b2cTitle: Knowledge Adventure with Your AI Partner
LandingPage.b2cSubtitle: Find the answers to the questions AI cannot answer. Complete quests in the Academy, go on adventures, collect gold, and grow into the best data trainer!
LandingPage.feat1Desc: Evaluate other users' answers and correct errors to increase reliability. You become the main character preventing AI nonsense.
LandingPage.feat2Desc: Spend the gold you acquired in roguelike-style exploration. Defeat bug monsters and obtain rare rewards.
LandingPage.feat3Desc: Your knowledge, judgment, and courage are recorded in a hexagonal chart. Challenge the 'Golden Brain' tier!
LandingPage.b2bTitle:
High-Quality RLHF Data,
Breaking the Limits of Collection Costs.
LandingPage.b2bSubtitle: No more mechanic part-timer answers. Introduce a 100% natural colloquial dialogue set collected via gamification-based crowdsourcing at an overwhelmingly low cost compared to before.
LandingPage.b2bCard1Desc: By providing game currency (Gold/EXP) instead of cash rewards, we innovatively lowered the massive data production unit cost.
LandingPage.b2bCard2Desc: Since users directly correct real real-world problems they encounter while talking to actual AIs, we secure the most natural practical data.
LandingPage.b2bCard3Desc: Extract only golden data by 100% blocking abuse through user voting and Trust Score systems.
LandingPage.useCasesValue: sLLM fine-tuning, Chatbot persona building, Hallucination suppression models, etc.

B2BPage.heroTitle:
Korean Colloquial RLHF Dataset
Verified by Top 1% Users
B2BPage.heroSubtitle: Mechanical labeling creates AI limitations. Register for our early-bird waitlist now and receive the most natural edge-case data samples for free.
B2BPage.sampleDesc: We provide high-quality conversational datasets in JSON / CSV format collected in real-world environments.
B2BPage.formPurpose: Purpose (e.g., sLLM fine-tuning, Chatbot persona, etc.)
B2BPage.formSubmit: Apply for Free Sample & Early Bird
B2BPage.faqWhyDesc: Through our proprietary 3-step cross-verification logic (creation-peer review-trust filtering), we block abuse and provide only 100% verified colloquial data.
B2BPage.faqCostDesc: During our closed beta period, waitlisted companies will receive massive discounts upon official launch.
B2BPage.successMsg: Your application has been submitted. Our team will contact you shortly.
